scope.summary: WS-C now has a machine-checked C1-C9 anti-recurrence ledger: all nine fixture close artifacts are present, all required red-run artifacts are present, C4 binds to the R3 installed-artifact browser lane, and C9 binds to the R1/C9 installed-artifact external-client lane.
out_of_scope: This close does not rerun every underlying C fixture; it audits their committed close/red-run evidence and records the umbrella binding.
C1-C3 and C5-C8 remain the offline fixtures described by the WS-C bead text, not duplicate installed-artifact rig lanes.
Release-candidate acceptance still owns the final failed-before/passes-after release ledger across the fix beads that flipped individual C fixtures green.

entry_points.name: WS-C C1-C9 fixture ledger
entry_points.trace: `python3 scripts/rig/ws_c_wire_fixture_ledger.py --out tests/artifacts/evidence/ws-c-wire-fixtures-ledger.json` exited 0 and wrote status=pass with fixtures_total=9, missing_evidence_count=0, installed_artifact_wire_count=2, offline_fixture_count=7.

entry_points.name: C4 installed-artifact browser binding
entry_points.trace: Ledger binds C4 to tests/artifacts/evidence/closes/oraclemcp-091-c4-dashboard-browser-flow-cw3e2.json, whose evidence records rig_browser_lane building the installed artifact with omcpb and driving Chromium through Playwright.

entry_points.name: C9 installed-artifact external-client binding
entry_points.trace: Ledger binds C9 to tests/artifacts/evidence/closes/oraclemcp-091-c9-snippet-truth-00gb2.json and tests/artifacts/evidence/ws-c-red-runs/oraclemcp-091-c9-snippet-truth-00gb2.json, whose evidence records installing oraclemcp from git archive HEAD and driving raw stdio/HTTP clients against the emitted setup snippets.

entry_points.name: C1-C3 and C5-C8 offline fixture bindings
entry_points.trace: Ledger records present close and red-run evidence for C1, C2, C3, C5, C6, C7, and C8 and marks them as the offline fixture class named in the WS-C bead text.

limitations: Scoped proof only: the umbrella ledger and its committed evidence were verified, not a workspace-wide cargo gate.
The close does not claim C1-C3/C5-C8 are installed-artifact rig lanes; it preserves that distinction in the ledger.
follow_ups: oraclemcp-eng-program-bp8ia.13 re-asserts the full failed-before/passes-after release ledger at RC acceptance.
